subject: THIS WEEK: Recognizing our Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
Peter,
This week, Eric traveled the state and visited with Missouri’s finest: our first responders, police officers, and veterans.

Below are Eric’s accounts from meeting with these heroes.

Our First Responders make Missouri proud by serving in disaster relief

https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/posts/10155853728654747?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629

"Be proud. When Hurricane Harvey hit Texas, rescue teams from the Kansas City Fire Department and Central Jackson County Fire loaded trailers full of life saving equipment, tools, and boats, and drove to Houston.

When their fellow Americans were in trouble, these men stepped up. They searched neighborhoods, executed difficult operations, and saved lives.

They did us all proud, and on behalf of all Missourians—I was honored to thank them yesterday."
See More (https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/posts/10155853728654747?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629)

Welcoming home Honor Flight Veterans

https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/posts/10155854854649747?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629

“A Missouri family invited us to welcome their uncle, a World War II veteran, home from an Honor Flight last night.

Yesterday, 93-year-old World War II veteran James Long received a hero’s welcome in Springfield. From 1943 to 1945, Long was a member of US Army Ranger Group 4th Battalion and volunteered for the First Special Service Force—the famed “The Black Devils.” Legend has it that an enemy journal had a line about this unit: ‘The Black Devils are all around us every time we come into the line. We never hear them come.’”
Read More (https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/posts/10155854854649747?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629)

Supporting Law Enforcement

https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/photos/a.10153172780764747.1073741826.253153019746/10155856964289747/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629

"Yesterday, I had breakfast with Taney County Sheriff Deputy Darin Carter, his wife Julie, and his fellow officers. We had some steak and eggs, and he told me about when he was shot.

Darin had knocked on hundreds of doors in his law enforcement career. That day, when the door he knocked on opened, a man pointed a gun at his chest and fired. Darin dodged that bullet, but in the firefight, he was hit in the shoulder."
Read More (https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/photos/a.10153172780764747.1073741826.253153019746/10155856964289747/?type=3&theater&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629)

-Team Greitens

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=4a71d6335a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2017_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-4a71d6335a-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (https://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=4a71d6335a) .

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: [Volunteers needed] Help our women win in Virginia >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c630a/24c69fd9/17d1546a0/189c03db/1774144377/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENEJ53_digital_email_20171026_VAgeneral&source=WQENEJ53_digital_email_20171026_VAgeneral")
---

Peter,

The Virginia election is just 12 days away, and we are ramping up to help our candidates there win.

Right now we have **16** endorsed women running, all for House of Delegates seats.

These races are expected to be close, so our women need a small army of volunteers to make sure voters who support them get to the polls.

**[Sign up to volunteer to help our women running in Virginia turn out critical votes they need to win on Election Day.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c630a/24c69fd9/17d1546a0/189c03d4/1774144377/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171026_email_VAgeneral?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+to+volunteer+to+help+our+women+r&utm_campaign=WQENEJ53_digital_email_20171026_VAgeneral&source=WQENEJ53_digital_email_20171026_VAgeneral")**

These are phenomenal candidates I guarantee you'll be proud to say you helped elect. Here are some of them:
There's **Danica Roem** , a reporter who, if elected, would be the first openly transgender state representative in the COUNTRY. She's running against a viciously anti-LGBTQ incumbent who authored the state's discriminatory "bathroom bill."

**Hala Ayala** , whose father was an immigrant from El Salvador, and **Elizabeth Guzman** , an immigrant from Peru, would be the first Latinas elected to the legislature.

And**Jennifer Carroll Foy** is a public defender who attended the Virginia Military Institute during one of the first years women were allowed to attend. She won her primary by 12 votes while being on bed rest on election night due to her pregnancy with twins.
These women, along with other EMILY's List-endorsed candidates, need us to show up if they're going to win. **And you showing up to help really does make a difference, Peter.**

A strong program to get out the vote can change turnout by up to five percent. In 2013, five of the closest races for the Virginia House of Delegates were less than two points apart -- and Republicans won four of them. If Democrats could have turned out a couple hundred more voters in those districts, they could have won.

I'm so excited to get down to Virginia to help make sure voters get to the polls. I hope you'll volunteer too to help our women win.

**Sign up to help our Virginia candidates get out the vote:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Volunteer-in-Virginia](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c630a/24c69fd9/17d1546a0/189c03d5/1774144377/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20171026_email_VAgeneral?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgVolunteerinVirgi&utm_campaign=WQENEJ53_digital_email_20171026_VAgeneral&source=WQENEJ53_digital_email_20171026_VAgeneral")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

name: The White House
subject: Fighting a Crisis, Forging the Future
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff202b21290d8aa77d7fabfe70e13ff309aa48f1081a761095831bbd69be6d5b934ba94131421d186c7d2d9075f444d3655f0

Yesterday, Congress passed a pro-growth 2018 joint budget resolution, setting the stage for economic relief for the American people in the form of tax cuts, job creation, and simplification of the burdensome tax code. President Donald J. Trump applauds Congress for taking preliminary steps toward pro-jobs, pro-business, pro-America economic reform. Read the full statement from the Press Secretary
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff2020c7c08640c8c4d3e4e7d3b083737657d929726d72a7563df45789cf1441012c2abbbbbf6fee950efe1cfc57a393d54f6
here and learn more about the Unified Framework for Tax Reform
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff202817f4158ea1c7477f355d532d1e61151d9d23bb5676edea6c3268766e2890b4c682c94068ec87ac084b017bc2eee6574
here.

-----------------

Keeping America’s Middle Class Strong and Prosperous

On Wednesday, Vice President Mike Pence published an op-ed in the Denver Post in advance of his visit to Denver, Colorado.
“Tax cuts are long overdue. It’s been more than 30 years since President Ronald Reagan passed the last major tax reform, and since those days, America has fallen behind.... In recent years, Denver alone has lost 5 percent of its middle class,” Vice President Pence wrote. The Unified Framework for Tax Reform is specifically oriented to serving the middle class and keeping more dollars in the pockets of hardworking Americans.
Read the Vice President’s full op-ed
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff202549f4ce60ad0870ddf8715ec81e76b07e4c920c04d4b3fee479247f0226fcffa41826ed9a89c234427fcabc2ade22edc
here.

Decisive Action on the Opioid Crisis

Yesterday at the White House, President Trump declared the nationwide opioid crisis in the United States a public health emergency. President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump spoke on the impact of America’s epidemic of drug addiction on children and families, and commended the courageous individuals working to combat the opioid crisis in various ways.

In his remarks, the President recalled the tragic loss of his brother Fred, and urged Americans never to begin using addictive substances. “Illegal drug use is not a victimless crime,” the President said. “There is nothing admirable, positive, or socially desirable about it... We want the next generation of young Americans to know the blessings of a drug-free life.”
Read more about President Trump’s strategy to fight the opioid crisis
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff2020ae496f3c647ddba0ad5646c6f669a91401926be5a40538a4e309172bdcb5602cc57fb3a5ae12a049ed7e2d872b4f355
here.

Developments Ahead for American Aerospace
President Trump and his Administration are creating a new program to accelerate the integration of Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS, also known as drones) into American aerospace. Until now, America’s outdated aerospace regulations have driven Americans to establish offshore zones for drone innovation and testing. The pilot program will increase the number and complexity of UAS operations in the United States and pave the way for developing a national aerospace regulatory system.

Read more on what this means for American aviation
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff2029c6c2cd4c6946226c94081410b5d634d10780d3fd227dd211eac4c3b2fed8c3459cbb912d3ca9752e65c667a81380562
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump, joined by First Lady Melania Trump, signs a Presidential Memorandum ordering the Acting Secretary of Health and Human Services to declare the opioid crisis a national public health emergency | October 26, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will receive his daily intelligence briefing, followed by a meeting with the Secretary of the Interior, Ryan Zinke. Vice President Mike Pence will be in North Dakota visiting Minot Air Force Base for a briefing on base operations and a tour of the launch facility.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff2024c1b6cf8c469eae838e7c30654055579fd144f88b486ccbab7071c4031bfb0c88ed9f20ed0846190dea3472ead656bca
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=73643637f16ff20282a63e7dd98b252521670399a991c29d5f25063822a679fdcae6448bd8654e6b0cc9b226d822f32fdabec15e240da4a5
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d45f65aa5abeb144d058a972ac1f337cc0fa6aeb3e2b11ba83be695ca469bcf0e3bd2cbfbd689656d789724323830afa3f
Unsubscribe

name: Democrats.org
subject: This is how we win elections, Derek:
body:
Let's start November with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline to help Democrats compete and win all over the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac6/4067b0a/464f1b8e0/7e6708d5/1390391838/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171027_js_nd&source=em_20171027_js_nd&refcode=em_20171027_js_nd")**
**
Derek, I'm Joe Smolskis -- Chief Financial Officer here at DNC HQ.

I want to talk to you about the next four days.

We're coming up on the end of October, which is our last fundraising deadline before Election Day 2017. With elections in Virginia in 11 days and a special election in Alabama in December, this deadline will decide so much.

The Democratic Party relies on grassroots supporters like you because that's how we win elections. We build this party with every door you knock, call you make, and dollar that you donate.

Electing Democrats is the only true way to push back against Trump and the GOP's reckless agenda. We need to stop them in their tracks and take back control of Congress next year.

These moments matter. If you can, pitch in $3 before our fundraising deadline and help elect Democrats nationwide.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I need your help securing a victory for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

27 percent. That's how many Virginia voters remain undecided in the Governor's race, according to the latest poll. That means that over the next week and a half, we've got to double down on showing Virginians exactly who Ralph Northam is and why he's the right choice for Governor.

But we can't do that unless we have the resources to talk to as many voters as possible. That's where you come in. You're a longtime Team Kaine supporter, and I can't thank you enough for all you've done over the years. Now, I'm asking you to step up again and make a donation to make sure we keep strong Democratic leadership in Virginia. Will you chip in $17 or whatever you can right now?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express donate $15 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171027va&amount=15 ] Express donate $25 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171027va&amount=25 ] Express donate $50 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171027va&amount=50 ] Express donate $100 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?express_lane=true&refcode=20171027va&amount=100 ] Or, donate a different amount >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?refcode=20171027va ]

When you contribute today, you're helping ensure a win for Ralph this November -- and you're building the foundation for a win next November, too. We've seen unprecedented actions from President Trump over the past nine months. From repeatedly trying to implement an offensive and unconstitutional Muslim ban that would prevent many refugees and immigrants from finding safety in the United States, to rolling back the birth control mandate of the ACA and denying access to affordable contraception to millions of women based on the personal beliefs of their bosses... it's never been this clear that every single one of us must stand up for the leadership and government that we believe in.

The first step in fighting back against this extreme agenda is to ensure that Ralph Northam is elected as the next Governor of Virginia. Ralph is an army veteran, a doctor who has volunteered countless hours to help sick kids, and a proven leader who is determined to keep moving Virginia forward.

The next step is making sure we hold Democratic seats in the Senate during next year's midterm elections. So many of the critical fights we're facing come down to just a handful of votes (or even just one vote, as in the health care repeal effort seen in July). We simply can't lose a single seat. I'm ready to keep fighting for progress, and I hope you're ready to fight with me.

If you are, please make a quick online donation today. Your support will make the difference. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?refcode=20171027va&amount=25 ]

Thank you.

Tim Kaine

DONATE [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginia-democrats?refcode=20171027va&amount=25 ]

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://action.timkaine.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1379911 ].

name: Dr. Stephanie Kelton, The Sanders Institute
subject: Bold Ideas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
Friend,
It's no secret that millions of Americans are being left behind by an elite group of wealthy individuals who are exercising greater and greater control over our nation's economy, the media, and our political process.
People of all political stripes understand that our democracy is teetering on the brink of oligarchy. Too many Americans lack the jobs and the health care they need. They're struggling to protect their kids and provide them with a decent education; and they have little, if anything, set aside for their own retirement. Life is precarious, and our changing climate is only adding to the misery as fires and hurricanes ravage homes and businesses and take the lives of loved ones.
However, there is a silver lining, and I've decided to be part of it. Millions of people are prepared to do the hard work necessary to transform America into a more democratic, just, and free society.
That transformation requires two things:
1. Millions of people getting organized, fighting for the power of the many over the few, and demanding a voice in the critical debates that will shape our nation's future.
2. Bold policy ideas to fill the space opened up by social movements and base-building organizations on the ground.

The Sanders Institute is a place where these two goals come together and reinforce one another. Political, labor, and social movement leaders like Nina Turner, Ben Jealous and Michael Lighty are organizing and campaigning to build grassroots power and shift the political terrain. As a Professor of Public Policy & Economics, I'm dedicated to fighting inequality, poverty and economic stagnation.
Establishment economics won't get us where we need to go. _**We need a bold policy agenda to take advantage of our vast capacity to build an economy that cares for our people and our planet in a way that makes us proud to call ourselves Americans.**_
We know that another world is possible. We know that millions upon millions of everyday Americans believe in a world where everyone has a right to a decent job, healthcare, and the college education they want and need. We know that it will take powerful movements and bold ideas, working together, to make that vision real. And we know that The Sanders Institute can be an important place for that vital work to happen.
[**That 's why I support The Sanders Institute, and why I hope you will too.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aeeb/bed43eb/15df2cd3/75ff13c3/3139574147/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em171027-subb")
Dr. Stephanie Kelton, Sanders Institute Founding Fellow, 2017
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aeeb/bed43eb/15df2cd3/75ff13c3/3139574147/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em171027-subb")**
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a pending 501(c)(3) organization.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401

We know that it will take powerful movements and bold ideas, working together, to make that vision real. And we know that The Sanders Institute can be an important place for that vital work to happen. name: Keith Ellison
subject: Tom and I hear this all the time:
body:
Let's start November with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $10 or whatever you can before Tuesday's end-of-month deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc78/2584986462/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem")**

One of the most common things Tom and I hear when we're talking with grassroots supporters in your community and across the country is this: Folks want to know what we're doing to fix what's going on in Washington.

So let me tell you, Derek:

* Our success depends on how well we organize. That's why we're getting back to basics and investing millions to establish a national grassroots organizing infrastructure so we can compete in every single zip code.

* We're winning again. Democrats have won in special elections in historically "Republican" districts from Oklahoma to Florida to New Hampshire, and we're setting the table for even more big victories this year in states like Virginia and Alabama. The momentum is on our side, and we're geared up to **[take back Congress in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc06/2584986462/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+take+back+Congress+in+2018&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem")**

* In Congress and statehouses all across the country, our mission is simple: Don't bend or fold. Every Democrat I know is fighting as hard as they can to make sure health care, women's rights, voting rights, our environment, and every one of our civil and human rights as Americans remain protected.

We absolutely still have our work cut out for us, but I know we can win with your continued support.

If you're committed to electing Democrats this year, next year, and in 2020, pitch in $10 or more today.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc01/2584986462/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem")

[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc0f/2584986462/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc0c/2584986462/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc0d/2584986462/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem")

** Thanks, Derek. Now let's get to work.

Keith

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc08/2584986462/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ac1/4067b0a/4649ba2db/7e67fc16/2584986462/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171027+_ke_rem&source=em_20171027+_ke_rem&refcode=em_20171027_ke_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

| **Talking #TaxReform on the Road**
* * *
This morning, I had the pleasure of joining Fishers Mayor **Scott Fadness** and a group of dynamic business and community leaders to discuss the urgent need for federal tax reform. The individuals who sat around the table all came from different backgrounds, but all have one goal in mind: simplifying our federal tax code so that we can grow our economy and create more jobs.

Tax reform has played a large role in Indiana's success story, and I know it will play a pivotal role in America's renewal, as well. We already put Hoosier taxpayers first in Indiana, now it's time that we put American taxpayers first, too! (You can read more about federal tax reform below.)

_**I also want to remind everyone about our 1st Annual Team Holcomb Fall Dinner taking place on Friday, November 17, 2017, at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.**_ This event is taking the place of the usual Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner that you're used to so that we can take advantage of our unique, one-of-a-kind fundraising agreement between the Indiana Republican Party and Eric Holcomb for Indiana to benefit candidates up and down the ballot in 2018. I hope you can join me, Governor **Eric Holcomb** , Iraq War Veteran and Purple Heart Recipient **Josh Bleill** and Medal of Honor Recipient **Sammy L. Davis** for a fun night Celebrating Our Military. [Click here for more information.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ed04b856b&e=1acd9bb3d6)

\- Kyle Hupfer

(Photos: Top - Chairman Hupfer and Fishers Mayor Scott Fadness host a roundtable on federal tax reform; Bottom - Chairman Hupfer with State Senator **Erin Houchin** and speaking at the Orange County Fall Dinner in Paoli on Monday evening.)

| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
---
| A few weeks ago, Governor Eric Holcomb partnered with Indiana University to launch a $50 million dollar [effort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a52fe12f29&e=1acd9bb3d6) to help combat our state's opioid epidemic. This week, the Governor and IU President **Michael A. McRobbie** [penned an op-ed](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ed382558a1&e=1acd9bb3d6) for FoxNews.com to discuss in greater detail the "full court" collaborative effort the State of Indiana is taking to help our fellow Hoosiers who need help ridding themselves of the scourge of addiction. Read more [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f9f2364f07&e=1acd9bb3d6).

The Governor also partnered up this week with Superintendent of Public Instruction Dr. **Jennifer McCormick** and EducationSuperHighway CEO **Evan Marwell** to [announce a partnership](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=96d3d466e8&e=1acd9bb3d6) that will provide 38,500 students with faster internet access. The Governor also took part in a celebration this week to mark the [third and final renovation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=76d19b087e&e=1acd9bb3d6) of the Evansville airport. The Evansville airport has gone under a nearly $19 million dollar three part renovation. The completion of this project will continue to open up Indiana to more and more business and investment opportunities.

Finally, as you read this Governor Holcomb and First Lady **Janet Holcomb** are en route India for an economic trade mission. Stay tuned to next week's Party Line for pictures!
---
|
---
|
---
No issue is more critical at this moment in the halls of Congress than the issue of federal tax reform. And it's become the topic du jour in Indiana as evidenced by the round table hosted by Chairman Hupfer and Mayor Fadness, as well as [this video released](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=153c770d01&e=1acd9bb3d6) by Senator **Todd Young** in which he stresses that tax reform for hard working families is long overdue. “Those manufacturing workers who work so hard and want to lead lives of dignity and purpose and prosperity depend on this tax cut,” said Senator Young. Check out Sen. Young's video, which includes an interview with Fox News, [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c56954ca5d&e=1acd9bb3d6).

The first step to passing federal tax reform took place this week when the [U.S. House passed the Senate's budget resolution](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1e0b7c69e4&e=1acd9bb3d6) on Thursday. Republicans have now unlocked procedural rules for the Senate to pass a tax reform package with a simple majority vote rather than 60 votes - and the timing couldn't be better. House Speaker **Paul Ryan** said Tuesday that Republicans are hoping to pass a tax reform package deal in the House by Thanksgiving.

name: Shailene Woodley, Our Revolution
subject: Honoring the Water Protectors
body:
Sovereign native nations have been under attack since before the United States' founding
#
Friends,
One year ago today the North Dakota State Troopers, Morton County Sheriff's Department, and National Guard suited up in riot gear and cleared thousands of water protectors from the Oceti Sakowin camp at Standing Rock.
Sovereign native nations have been under attack since before the United States' founding. It is long past the time where we need to recognize these attacks and stand united in helping those who have been hurt so much across the course of history. The Dakota Access Pipeline protests gave me hope that more of us are willing to fight back than ever before.
[**We need you in this fight too. Make a $5 contribution to boost our efforts to keep fossil fuels in the ground and uphold the treaty rights of our Indigenous sisters and brothers.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aee8/bed43eb/14316c32/75ff128b/3067379352/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oppose-dapl-keystone-xl?refcode=em171027-full&noskip=true")
Our nation's dangerous, unreliable addiction to fossil fuels is clear. Just last week, a pipeline burst off the Gulf Coast of Louisiana and spilled over 672,000 gallons of oil into the Gulf of Mexico. Puerto Rico and the US Virgin Islands have been without power for weeks after their antiquated fossil fuel infrastructure was destroyed by Hurricanes Irma and Maria. All the while, the Trump administration cuts back on environmental protections and destroys the EPA from within.
[**Make a $5 contribution to Our Revolution today, and help us continue our work with Indigenous communities and allies to keep fossil fuels in the ground.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aee8/bed43eb/14316c32/75ff128b/3067379352/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oppose-dapl-keystone-xl?refcode=em171027-full&noskip=true")
Continuing on our current path condemns us to a future of more extreme weather, disease, famine, forced migration, and armed conflict. We need to show the American people what a clean energy revolution can do--create millions of new jobs, improve our infrastructure, environment, and public health, and ensure the society we leave to our children and grandchildren is stronger than the one we found.
In solidarity,
Shailene Woodley
Board Member
Our Revolution

****NH REPUBLICAN PARTY****WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, OCTOBER 27TH** **_A Note From Jeanie_** **Dear Derek,**
**This morning I had the opportunity to talk with Karen Testerman on her show, Conservative Chic Chat (WSMN 1590 AM). We talked about President Trump’s Unified Tax Reform Framework. ********Sure, tax reform might sound boring, but this effort has the opportunity to create seismic positive changes for every working American. [The President’s Tax Reform Framework](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyJawJrCw9IR0bg1DC3zHyt9qCyqO11GqBtJJLdPKTBpw_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M8a-2F9R2Gxqndj0rs5MOZRrzPJ2-2FFh6k-2Bhxmx3wpQxUU8-2FrA2wwuRAsO-2BqABb30oovtRLKfwad6hvQQjR0XZ-2Fps1nCDt43hVt-2BydqeWd5Uk3u2MnBI-2BkLVZhvZcW7C-2B6D-2BCosN019eugQ6EPXFsvNdOGJHaA5J-2FtpjmaNMTzBsr8oagtbuRIKXAKi5aAA1Nbf7cOJ5pwpGCiFtsVCX5OUw2hAcr19bDdWzHdhMeM1Dmn-2FaXiMEmyUnOBc4tfqsb6l8KcbpRI2s-2B3eRhRDb32ta8w-3D-3D) is targeted to serving the middle class and keeping more dollars in the pockets of hardworking Americans.********And yesterday, Congress passed a pro-growth 2018 joint budget resolution that sets the stage for economic relief for the American people. This relief will come in the form of tax cuts, job creation, and simplifying our tax code.********You don’t have to look far to know that cutting taxes and reducing regulation leads to prosperity—because we’re doing it right here in New Hampshire. If you haven’t had the chance, [read Sen. Jeb Bradley’s op ed in the Union Leader this past Thursday (A Tale of Two States).](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR68FCZ1ORcmaqVtkCxJzc4U3kOYqCFYsjV1Zz-2F5zXPfBgvRbWUZfnMTFdpBu2XhOGBSNm-2B4nC9M7BNDD4LaLruP_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M8a-2F9R2Gxqndj0rs5MOZRrzPJ2-2FFh6k-2Bhxmx3wpQxUU8-2FrA2wwuRAsO-2BqABb30oovtRLKfwad6hvQQjR0XZ-2Fps-2Bn5XfXN0kbe5liTipsC45nIAjbrVSeflSYUnJXUqRWh-2FLOiLiKxXIzK1Yq-2BD78jJ3fBmHWfyOPegFSZJ28fWLOHVrQDDWoGagsI2B2KboNVvE6X8MQTbTxRe0K-2BYCR87SaoI2dpNoNwP4GStxnqP7sxJeuAsfxo9X5YWdmVdJTznWhBTySoTJ-2Bwr6-2BvBF8Xhw-3D-3D) The op ed does an excellent job of proving out that the right policies lead to success.********Karen asked me how listeners could help. Great question! If you haven’t already, go to [nh.gop](nh.gop) and learn more about President Trump’s tax reform plan. Then, write a letter to the editor, or an op ed. If you need some talking points, [send Joe Sweeney in our office an email](mailto:joe@nhgop.org?subject=Tax Reform Talking Points "joe@nhgop.org"). We talked about President Trump’s Unified Tax Reform Framework. ****Sure, tax reform might sound boring, but this effort has the opportunity to create seismic positive changes for every working American. is targeted to serving the middle class and keeping more dollars in the pockets of hardworking Americans.****And yesterday, Congress passed a pro-growth 2018 joint budget resolution that sets the stage for economic relief for the American people. This relief will come in the form of tax cuts, job creation, and simplifying our tax code.****You don’t have to look far to know that cutting taxes and reducing regulation leads to prosperity—because we’re doing it right here in New Hampshire. If you haven’t had the chance, The op ed does an excellent job of proving out that the right policies lead to success.****Karen asked me how listeners could help. Great question! | | Peter, One thing you might not know about me: I'm a huge NBA fan. And I'm thrilled that basketball season has started -- except that I can't watch a game without seeing the Koch Brothers' attack ad against Joe, more than a year before the election. **I have seen the ad enough times now that I can almost recite their attempts to smear Joe from memory; which makes sense because their group, Americans for Prosperity, poured $2 million into Indiana in an attempt to buy our seat. _And they 're just getting started. _** **We need your help to send a message: this seat is NOT for sale.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

You see, shady corporate groups like the Kochs want a senator who's a rubber stamp for their interests -- not Hoosiers'. And they're willing to do _anything_ to make it happen.
**That 's why this race is one of the closest in the country, and we need to fight back now.** **[Can you chip in $1 right now?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24a0/7377f838/34e9c0ed/51fbbf2b/252771402/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-1027?refcode=20171027nd&amount=10")**
But while the GOP and Koch Brothers have their eyes on Joe, we know that the voices Joe cares about -- real Hoosiers -- have his back. During the last election cycle Joe's average donation was $15, not $1.5 million. If came from grassroots supporters like you, not wealthy special interests.
**Peter, I want to be honest:** I'm not writing this email because I'm annoyed at having to see those ads attacking Joe during Pacers games (_although I am_). I'm writing because Joe has fought hard to protect the things real Hoosiers care about: affordable health care, keeping jobs in Indiana, and leveling the playing field for Hoosier workers. He cares about Kokomo, not the Kochs.
**We need to keep him in the Senate so he can continue fighting. **
[**Let him know you stand with him and donate $1 now to stand with our campaign today.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24a0/7377f838/34e9c0ed/51fbbf2b/252771402/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-1027?refcode=20171027nd&amount=10")
Go Pacers!
Thanks,
Peter

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: A quick note
body:
#
Team --
We're in Orlando this weekend for the Florida Democratic Party Conference to show people from across the state what a people-powered campaign looks like.
A recent poll shows that whichever candidate Florida Democrats choose to be their nominee for Governor will have a six point advantage against any Republican. This is an incredible opportunity for us to turn Florida blue, and I firmly believe that our campaign is in the best position to do that.
I'm the only candidate in our Gubernatorial primary who isn't a millionaire. I don't have a famous last name or the ability to write myself a big check.
Instead, I have a progressive platform and a whole range of ideas to make our state a better place for all of us. We've come together, and powered this campaign with well over 10,000 contributions, at an average of just $52.
We already know our advantage in the general election -- six points against any Republican. But we're counting on you to help us make through the primary election too.
[**Will you chip in today, before our end of month deadline, to help us keep up this people-powered momentum?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3261/9e00690/4e2ae6d9/240317a3/4146601022/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171027-eom")
I'm excited to see those of you who are in Orlando this weekend. And if you aren't, I'm sure I'll see on the road soon. Thank you for being a part of this movement.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3261/9e00690/4e2ae6d9/240317a3/4146601022/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171027-eom")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3261/9e00690/4e2ae6d9/240317a2/4146601022/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3261/9e00690/4e2ae6d9/240317a5/4146601022/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/").
